<?php /** * Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. All Rights Reserved. * SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0. */ namespace AWS\CRT\Auth; use AWS\CRT\NativeResource as NativeResource; /** * Base class for credentials providers */ abstract class CredentialsProvider extends NativeResource { function __construct(array $options = []) { parent::__construct(); } function __destruct() { self::$crt->credentials_provider_release($this->release()); parent::__destruct(); } }
